Class Country

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.model.Country
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Country>
public class Country extends Observable implements Comparable<Country>, Serializable
Define class of a country The following is only base code, further features need to be added Note: 1. No arg in notifyObservers() call because view will refresh all the elements on "Country" node;
See Also:

    • attack

      public boolean attack(Country defenderCountry)
      Attack another country
      Parameters:
      defenderCountry - Country being defender
      Returns:

    • isAdjacent

      public boolean isAdjacent(Country country)
      Test if two countries are adjacent
      Parameters:
      country - The country to be tested
      Returns:
      true-The country passed in argument is adjacent with current country, otherwise false

    • getAdjCountries

      public ArrayList<Country> getAdjCountries()
      Getter for adjacent list of countries
      Returns:
      The adjacentCountries list

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Country c)
      Compare two counties based on their ID
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Country>
      Parameters:
      c - Country need to be compare
      Returns:
      returns a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this employee id,is less than, equal to, or greater than the specified object.

    • isValidDefender

      public boolean isValidDefender(int defenderDiceNum)
      Test if dice num is valid for a defender
      Parameters:
      defenderDiceNum - The number of dice that the defender choose
      Returns:
      If the dice is less than armies owned in the country, return true else return false

    • isValidAttacker

      public boolean isValidAttacker(int attackerDiceNum)
      Test if dice num is valid for a attacker
      Parameters:
      attackerDiceNum - The number of dice that the attacker choose
      Returns:
      If the dice is less than armies owned in the country, and more than 0, less than 3, return true else return false

    • hasAdjEnemy

      public boolean hasAdjEnemy()
      Test is it has adjacent enemy (the owner is different)
      Returns:
      true, has; false no enemy in the adjacent countries
